Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fishers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Fishers are the ancestral enemy of the Sandvipers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Fishers are a group that Lindon and Yerin encounter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Fishers are a group that captured Sandviper miners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Fishers follow the law of the Wilds: you take whatever you can keep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — The Fishers led Lindon to a tall building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — The Fishers follow the Path of the Fisherman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Fishers are a sect that hunts Remnants and sacred beasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Fishers are experts at tracking, navigating the wilderness, and extracting natural treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Fishers honor their debts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The Fishers provided Yerin with a new sacred artist's robe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — The Fishers have helped navigate most of the doors in the Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Fishers are a group that uses hooks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — The Fishers are a group that includes Ragahn and Lindon's companion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — The Fishers provided Yerin with a little cottage.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Scouts from the Fishers have spotted Arelius banners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Fishers can advance Lindon past the Iron stage.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Fishers were hiding nearby.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
